creator: magik@roorback.net
text:
Patches and shell archives are available from 
http://files.roorback.net/e17/ports/

I simplified ecore and evas to single ports (with all modules), because they are small, so build don't take much time, and binaries don't take much space on
disk (and it simplifies maintenance).

List of packages that is obsoleted and related ports should be also:
audio/emphasis
databases/edb
devel/engrave
devel/evfs
graphics/epeg
graphics/epsilon
graphics/evas-loader-edb
graphics/exhibit
multimedia/eclair
sysutils/extrackt
x11/ecore-desktop
x11/enity
x11/examine
x11-fm/entropyfm
x11-toolkits/enhance
x11-toolkits/etk
x11-wm/e17-utils


latest snaposhot of this ports depedns on obsoleted epsilon:
x11/elicit
graphics/esmart
x11-toolkits/ewl
